defaultViews.description: High-confidence county-hosted vacant leads with conservative source-quality filters.
defaultViews.filter_expression: lead_score_tier in ('high','very_high') AND parcel_vacant_flag = true AND county_hosted_flag = true AND high_confidence_link_flag = true AND wetland_flag = false AND amount_trust_tier != 'not_trusted_for_prominent_display'

defaultViews.description: High-confidence county-hosted vacant leads with conservative source-quality filters.
defaultViews.filter_expression: lead_score_tier in ('high','very_high') AND parcel_vacant_flag = true AND county_hosted_flag = true AND high_confidence_link_flag = true AND wetland_flag = false AND amount_trust_tier != 'not_trusted_for_prominent_display'

defaultViews.description: Vacant delinquent land with access and no wetland default applied.
defaultViews.filter_expression: lead_score_tier in ('high','very_high') AND parcel_vacant_flag = true AND wetland_flag = false AND road_access_tier in ('direct','near')

defaultViews.description: Vacant delinquent land with access and no wetland default applied.
defaultViews.filter_expression: lead_score_tier in ('high','very_high') AND parcel_vacant_flag = true AND wetland_flag = false AND road_access_tier in ('direct','near')
lead_score_tier in ('high','very_high') AND parcel_vacant_flag = true AND acreage >= 5 AND county_hosted_flag = true
lead_score_tier in ('high','very_high') AND parcel_vacant_flag = true AND acreage >= 5 AND county_hosted_flag = true

defaultViews.description: Vacant or lightly improved leads near moderate or high nearby building density.
defaultViews.filter_expression: lead_score_tier in ('high','very_high') AND growth_pressure_bucket in ('moderate','high') AND road_access_tier in ('direct','near','moderate')

defaultViews.description: Vacant or lightly improved leads near moderate or high nearby building density.
defaultViews.filter_expression: lead_score_tier in ('high','very_high') AND growth_pressure_bucket in ('moderate','high') AND road_access_tier in ('direct','near','moderate')

fieldReadiness.notes: Parcel-side numeric distance exists and is used in scoring.
Derived directly from road_distance_ft using deterministic buckets.

fieldReadiness.ui_guidance: Expose as contextual label/filter only, not proximity.
fieldReadiness.notes: Provider-name presence does not imply numeric utility proximity.
No numeric electric/power proximity distance field exists in the current lead dataset.

fieldReadiness.ui_guidance: Expose as optional owner-targeting filter, not default safety gate.
fieldReadiness.notes: Useful but derived from mailing-vs-situs heuristics.

fieldReadiness.ui_guidance: Expose as optional owner-targeting filter, not default safety gate.
Show with amount_trust_tier badge and keep out of strict default sorting.
fieldReadiness.notes: Amount quality varies by county/source; trust tier should always travel with it.

fieldReadiness.ui_guidance: Expose as a filter and default guard when amount is displayed prominently.
fieldReadiness.notes: This is the correct control for amount-quality gating.
